description: secretx-signature has no README.md file and no 'readme = "README.md"' entry in its Cargo.toml. Every other crate in the workspace that ships as a standalone crate (secretx-aws-kms, secretx-local-signing, secretx-pkcs11, secretx-wolfhsm, secretx-cache, secretx-core, etc.) has both a README.md file and the corresponding Cargo.toml field. Without readme, crates.io will show no documentation landing page for the crate. Affected files: secretx-signature/Cargo.toml (missing readme field), secretx-signature/ (missing README.md).
title: secretx-signature missing README.md and readme field
